mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_task_ship (task_id, todo_id, project_id) VALUES
(#{item.taskId}, #{item.todoId}, #{item.projectId})
mapper.select: SELECT task_id AS taskId FROM tbl_task_ship WHERE todo_id = #{todoId}
SELECT project_id AS projectId FROM tbl_task_ship WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
SELECT todo_id AS todoId FROM tbl_task_ship WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
